title: Fluffy Indian Beans Dal
description: A grassy, fluffy, one-pot Indian dish featuring refried beans, temper, and satvik-friendly ingredients. Serve with basmati rice or naan for a complete meal.
instructions: Heat oil in a large, deep skillet over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the ground cumin, garam masala, turmeric, and cayenne pepper.
Add the refried beans, diced tomatoes, salt, and black pepper.
Bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and cook, covered, until the flavors have melded together and the liquid has been absorbed, about 20 minutes.
Stir in the cilantro and serve hot.
Garnish with additional cilantro, if desired.
Serve with basmati rice or naan, if desired.
